productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Navy Blue Track Pants
description: Style NoteIf you want to look stylish as you work out in the gym, or go for a walk or jog in the park, these navy blue track pants from adidas belong in your wardrobe. The fabric is breathable, and the waistband is soft for a more snug Fit you can use the internal drawstring too. Team it up with a cool T-shirt and an excellent pair of shoes and you'll be ready to hit the road.Product DetailsBlack track pants, adidas's three patented stripes along the sides in white, zipped side pockets, engineered with climacool technology, comfortable elastic waistband with inner drawstring, brand name and logo printed on the left leg and toggle straps at the hemMaterial and Care100% polyesterMachine wash at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, tumble dry or bleachFlat dry in shadeCool iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size M
